expected_evidence: terminal bridge result with savedexperiment path
T2star fit only if signal visible
FFT check near det +/- expected 13C Larmor

expected_signal_model.detuning_revision_reason: Initial 51 point / 100k reps advisory exceeded the 600 s daytime per-average tracking cap. Revised to 43 points, det=1.5 MHz, 8 x 50000 reps to preserve 400k shots while keeping nominal and ~1sigma center-error sidebands below Nyquist.
expected_signal_model.distinguishability: Revised grid preserves the 8 us span and 125 kHz FFT bins. A 5% Ramsey oscillation is still ~32x the binomial floor before drift/systematics.

scientific_rationale: The initial 51 point / 100k-rep Ramsey plan exceeded the current 600 s daytime per-average tracking cap. This revision preserves the 8 us span and 400k total shots by using 43 tau points, 8 averages x 50000 reps, and det=1.5 MHz so expected 13C sidebands remain below Nyquist. Terminal pODMR accepted c02 as the aligned branch.
stop_conditions: per-average tracking window exceeds current advisory cap after revision
tracking/count gate fails before data; treat as freshness evidence
hardware/safety/code uncertainty or explicit human STOP
success_criteria: Bridge execute completes with saved data and healthy counts
raw/readout-aware review supports a T2star conclusion or a well-supported non-observation
FFT review supports or rules out obvious 13C sidebands without isolated low-SNR peaks
summary: Revised bounded Ramsey/T2star scout for accepted aligned candidate reimage1804_c02.
